meta_title: For Freelancers: project management to Solve can't debug code (Intermediate Case Study)
meta_description: Learn how to project management and overcome can't debug code. A Intermediate-level Case Study using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Stop Debugging: Project Management for Freelance Developers
content.seo_description: Stop wasting hours debugging code. Learn how senior freelancers use project management, Antigravity, and Claude Code to ship faster and impress clients.
content.answer_block: Debugging isn't a coding problem; it's a project management failure. By structuring your architecture with modular logic and utilizing AI-driven tools like Antigravity and Claude Code, you can isolate errors before they manifest. Shift from reactive fire-fighting to proactive system design to reclaim your billable hours.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking, the client is pinging you on Slack, and your terminal is a graveyard of stack traces. You’ve spent four hours chasing a ghost bug in a legacy codebase, and your hourly rate is effectively plummeting to zero. This is the silent killer of the freelance business model: the debugging trap.

But what if you didn't have to 'debug' at all? By treating your code as a project management challenge rather than a syntax puzzle, you can eliminate the chaos. We are going to deploy a systematic workflow that leverages AI-native tools to turn your development process from a frantic search into a predictable, high-speed assembly line.

steps.title: Architectural Decomposition
steps.description: Break your feature requests into atomic modules. Debugging is easier when the surface area of the failure is limited to a single, isolated function.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze this feature request and decompose it into independent, testable modules. Provide a dependency graph and define the input/output schema for each module.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Break down the current feature into isolated modules'

steps.title: Constraint Mapping
steps.description: Define strict boundaries for your data flow. Most bugs occur at the interface between components; explicit constraints prevent these errors.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema validation layer for these modules. Ensure that all incoming data is sanitized and type-checked before processing.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Implement type-safe boundaries between modules'

steps.title: Automated Traceability
steps.description: Inject logging hooks that capture state at every transition point. This replaces manual debugging with a searchable audit trail.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Implement a structured logging middleware that captures state, timestamps, and error codes for every module execution.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Add structured logging to all module entry points'

steps.title: Error Isolation Patterns
steps.description: Implement the 'Circuit Breaker' pattern to prevent cascading failures that make debugging impossible.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Refactor this code to include a circuit breaker pattern. If a module fails, it should return a safe default value rather than crashing the process.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'Apply circuit breaker pattern to the payment gateway module'

steps.title: Continuous Validation
steps.description: Automate the verification of every change. If the test passes, the code is production-ready; if it fails, the error is already identified.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a suite of unit tests for these modules that cover both happy paths and edge cases.

pro_tips: Never debug in production; always reproduce the state locally by mocking the external API responses.
Use Claude Code to generate documentation for your modules immediately after writing them; it forces architectural clarity.
Treat your logs as a database; query them to find patterns in crashes rather than reading files manually.
If a bug takes longer than 30 minutes to find, delete the module and rebuild it; you will save time.
Standardize your project structure across every client project to make AI context injection seamless.
content.next_steps: Apply these steps to your current active project. Start by documenting your module boundaries today.
content.conversion_block: Stop fighting your code and start building your empire. Our community of elite freelancers is waiting to help you scale your output and double your rates. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
